title: Capture DSL
description: Demonstrate Parslet's capture DSL for binding parse results to variables within the grammar.

motivation.why: Capture allows binding intermediate parse results to variables for later use in the grammar. This enables cross-referencing and building complex structures from parts.
useCases: Referencing earlier parse results in later rules

inputFormat.description: Simple expressions that can be captured and referenced.

captured_value.description: The value captured by the capture DSL
